results.title: Rubio announces peace deal between Israel, Lebanon
results.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Friday announced that Israel and Lebanon reached a framework that could bring security to the region after months of war.

results.title: North African Migrant Drenched In Blood After Bashing Neighbor’s Head In With Hammer
results.description: A North African migrant was arrested in Spain after allegedly attacking his Senegalese neighbor in the head with a hammer Thursday. The man, an Algerian national, allegedly escalated a verbal dispute with two Senegalese men to a full-blown assault at approximately 6 p.m. local time in Torre Pacheco, La Verdad reported in Spanish. The attacker also [...] The post North African Migrant Drenched In Blood After Bashing Neighbor’s Head In With Hammer appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Fake Uber driver kidnapped woman outside Anfield Stadium and forced her to expose herself
results.description: Damian Watson, 36 has been jailed for five years and six months after posing as an Uber taxi driver to kidnap a woman and then force her to expose herself

results.title: 10 most expensive homes sold in Middlesex County, June 15-21
